final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid illustration for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design, soft rounded forms, expressive stylized proportions
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal panels, each panel framed as a torn circular hole in white paper, consistent head-and-shoulders framing across all panels
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, appearing in all 9 panels with different expressions and outfits
Scene/backdrop: plain off-white paper texture background with torn hole edges visible around each character portrait, unified studio lighting environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, warm and friendly atmosphere, subtle rim light on hair
Color palette: varied outfit colors as focal points (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral paper backdrop
Materials/textures: smooth 3D rendered skin, soft fabric textures for sweaters and jackets, matte paper surface with subtle fiber detail
Constraints: all 9 expressions must be clearly distinct; torn paper framing must be consistent across grid; character likeness must remain recognizable
Avoid: photorealistic skin pores; anime-style large eyes; watermark; text overlay; inconsistent lighting between panels; deformed hands or facial features

Panel specifications:
- Top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
- Top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
- Top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
- Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
- Middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
- Middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
- Bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
- Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
- Bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
